CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN age Int32;
ALTER TABLE test_table ORDER BY (name, date);
ALTER TABLE test_table ORDER BY (id, age);
ALTER TABLE test_table ORDER BY (name, age);
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY age;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id Int32, score Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY score;
SELECT tt.id, tt.name, tt.age FROM test_table tt JOIN test_table_2 tt2 ON tt.id = tt2.id ORDER BY tt.age, tt2.score;
CREATE TABLE test_table_3 (id Int32, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY category;
ALTER TABLE test_table_3 ORDER BY (category, id);
SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM test_table_3 GROUP BY category ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
ALTER TABLE test_table_3 ADD COLUMN created_at DateTime DEFAULT now();
ALTER TABLE test_table_3 ORDER BY (category, created_at);
SELECT tt.*, tt2.score FROM test_table_3 tt LEFT JOIN test_table_2 tt2 ON tt.id = tt2.id ORDER BY tt.category, tt2.score;
